predicate.title: Metrics over the evidence DAG: lead time and cycle time (Priority 1)
predicate.problem: The framework records everything but measures nothing: no way to see how long governed changes take from intent to merge, so the 'governed path as easy path' claim is unquantified. Owner directive: add metrics, first lead time and cycle time, prioritized.
acceptance_criteria: metric-lead-time and metric-cycle-time exist as knowledge nodes with precise definitions
spec/tools/metrics.py computes both from evidence + git history on demand (markdown and JSON)
The metrics workflow publishes the report on every push to main
Roadmap carries this as Priority 1 with named follow-ups (approval latency, waiver rate)
out_of_scope: Approval-latency and waiver-rate metrics (need slice-2 evidence)
